requirement_description: Steam generation capacity 60 TPH at 65 kg/cm2
thermax_standard: Standard AFBC 60 TPH rated at 67 kg/cm2

requirement_description: Boiler efficiency minimum 86% on GCV basis
thermax_standard: Standard efficiency 85.5% on NCV — 87% on GCV achievable
Standard AFBC supports coal + biomass only
proposed_alternative: Petcoke co-firing up to 20% with modified fuel handling

thermax_standard: Standard AFBC achieves <150 mg/Nm3 without SNCR
proposed_alternative: SNCR system addition to achieve <100 mg/Nm3

thermax_standard: Standard with in-bed limestone achieves <200 mg/Nm3
Standard delivery 16 months for 60 TPH AFBC
proposed_alternative: Fast-track manufacturing with 2-shift operation — 15 months achievable

requirement_description: Performance guarantee test within 3 months of commissioning
thermax_standard: Standard PG test window is 6 months
Standard practice includes HAZOP for all EPC projects
Standard ESD is SIL 1 rated
proposed_alternative: Upgrade to SIL 2 ESD with certified safety PLC

requirement_description: Thermic fluid heater 5 million kcal/hr capacity
thermax_standard: Standard TF heater range up to 6 million kcal/hr
Standard operating range up to 320°C with approved fluids
CEMS is optional add-on in standard scope
proposed_alternative: CEMS can be included as additional scope item

requirement_description: ZLD system — 200 KLD capacity with crystallizer
thermax_standard: Standard ZLD range includes 200 KLD with MEE + crystallizer

requirement_description: Product water TDS < 500 ppm for reuse
thermax_standard: Standard product water TDS 200-300 ppm
Standard AMC offering is 3 years
proposed_alternative: 5-year AMC available at escalated rate — year 4-5 at 115% of base

requirement_description: Absorption chiller 500 TR capacity — hot water driven
thermax_standard: Standard range up to 700 TR — steam and hot water variants
Standard COP 1.35-1.45 depending on operating conditions

requirement_description: Liquidated damages capped at 5% of contract value
thermax_standard: Standard LD cap is 10% of contract value
proposed_alternative: Counter-propose LD cap at 7.5% with step-wise penalty structure

requirement_description: WHRB for 150 MW gas turbine exhaust
thermax_standard: Standard WHRB designs available for GT exhaust up to 200 MW
Standard supplementary firing up to 25%
proposed_alternative: 25% supplementary firing standard — 30% requires burner upsizing
